## Description: <br>
Assist with Chainlink LINK tokens, oracle integrations, staking, and price feed usage. <br>

This skill is ready for commercial/non-commercial use. <br>

## Publisher: <br>
[ivangdavila](https://clawhub.ai/user/ivangdavila) <br>

### License/Terms of Use: <br>


## Use Case: <br>
Developers, engineers, and external users use this skill for concise Chainlink reference guidance covering LINK token basics, staking, oracle integrations, price feeds, VRF, CCIP, and common integration risks. <br>

### Deployment Geography for Use: <br>
Global <br>

## Known Risks and Mitigations: <br>
Risk: Chainlink contract addresses, staking terms, bridge support, and feed availability can change over time. <br>
Mitigation: Verify current details against official Chainlink documentation before making wallet, staking, bridge, or oracle-integration decisions. <br>
Risk: Crypto-token and DeFi guidance can affect financial or on-chain outcomes if applied without review. <br>
Mitigation: Treat the skill as reference guidance and independently review financial implications, contract addresses, and transaction parameters before execution. <br>

## Ethical Considerations: <br>
Users should evaluate whether this skill is appropriate for their environment, review any generated or modified files before relying on them, and apply their organization's safety, security, and compliance requirements before deployment. <br>
